name: Mini-Quiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease mini-muffin tins or use Teflon-lined ones.
3. Mix all ingredients together with an electric mixer.
4. Fill the muffin cups about 3/4 full.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until browned.
Hints:
- Add onion, bacon, mushrooms, etc., if desired.
- These can be frozen and reheated at 300°F or in the microwave for 3 minutes on high.
- This recipe makes about 1 1/2 dozen mini-quiches. Be sure to double the ingredients for a larger batch. Great!
